cases.prompt: Cultural or recreation properties in Skagit County, such as parks, camps, resorts, or public assembly uses.

failures.message: R2SearchError: DuckDB execution failed: Conversion Error: Could not convert string '' to INT32

action_plan: Fix the SQL-generation guardrail or schema contract named in the failure before rerunning the eval.
cases.next_action: Fix the SQL-generation guardrail or schema contract named in the failure before rerunning the eval.
cases.generated_sql:
SELECT
  ps.parcel_number,
  ps.land_use,
  ps.acres,
  ps.assessed_value,
  'Cultural or recreation land use code' AS match_reasons
FROM read_parquet('r2://openskagit/derived/parcel_search.parquet') AS ps
WHERE
  CAST(regexp_extract(COALESCE(ps.land_use, ''), '^\((\d+)\)', 1) AS INTEGER) BETWEEN 710 AND 790
cases.title: Cultural or Recreation Properties in Skagit County
cases.criteria_summary: Parcels with land use codes indicating cultural or recreation uses such as parks, camps, resorts, or public assembly.
